summary: Comprehensive testing of Invoice System completed. All backend APIs (23 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing verified all major features: invoice creation, view modal, record payment, search, filter, status management, and action dropdown options.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication login (200 OK)
Backend: List invoices (GET /api/invoices)
Backend: List invoices with status filter
Backend: Create invoice draft (POST /api/invoices)
Backend: Create invoice sent
Backend: Get invoice by ID (GET /api/invoices/{id})
Backend: Get invoice not found (404)
Backend: Update invoice (PUT /api/invoices/{id})
Backend: Update invoice status to sent
Backend: Update invoice status to paid
Backend: Update invoice status to cancelled
Backend: Update invoice status invalid (400)
Backend: Record payment (POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments)
Backend: Record full payment marks as paid
Backend: Record payment invalid amount (400)
Backend: Record multiple payments
Backend: Delete invoice (DELETE /api/invoices/{id})
Backend: Delete invoice not found (404)
Backend: Invoice totals calculation
Backend: Invoice different currencies (INR, USD, EUR, GBP)
Backend: Get customers for invoice
Backend: Get items for invoice
Backend: Invoice settings endpoint
Frontend: Invoices page loads with data-testid='invoices-page'
Frontend: Stats cards display (Total Invoices, Total Paid, Total Due, Overdue)
Frontend: New Invoice button opens create modal
Frontend: Create Invoice modal has all form fields (Invoice Number, Issue Date, Due Date, Customer, Payment Terms, Currency)
Frontend: Line Items section with Add Item button
Frontend: Totals calculation (Subtotal, Tax, Shipping, Total)
Frontend: Save as Draft and Save & Send buttons work
Frontend: Invoice created successfully with toast notification
Frontend: Actions dropdown has all options (View, Edit, Record Payment, Print, Download PDF, Share via WhatsApp, Mark as Sent, Cancel, Delete)
Frontend: View Invoice modal displays all invoice details
Frontend: View modal has Print, PDF, Edit, Record Payment buttons
Frontend: Record Payment modal opens with correct fields
Frontend: Payment recorded successfully with toast notification
Frontend: Search functionality filters invoices correctly
Frontend: Status filter works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: InvoicesPage.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Invoice creation form has all required fields: customer, dates, payment terms, currency, line items
Totals calculation (subtotal, item discounts, tax, shipping, total) implemented correctly
Payment tracking with multiple payment methods supported
PDF generation using jsPDF and html2canvas
Status management (Draft, Sent, Paid, Partial, Overdue, Cancelled) working
Backend API endpoints properly handle CRUD operations and status updates
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice INV-2602-0516 with customer AutoSelect Test 1769982055, item TEST_Verify_Product, recorded partial payment of ₹200
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice System fully tested. All CRUD operations, payment tracking, status management, PDF/Print, and WhatsApp sharing features verified. Backend has 23 passing tests in /app/backend/tests/test_invoices.py. Frontend UI tested via Playwright automation.

invoice_creation.line_items: WORKING - Item selection, Qty, Price, Discount %, Tax %, Total calculation
invoice_creation.totals: WORKING - Subtotal, Item Discounts, Overall Discount, Tax, Shipping, Total

invoice_list.status_filter: WORKING - Filters by status (All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Partial, Overdue, Cancelled)
invoice_list.table_display: WORKING - Invoice #, Customer, Date, Due Date, Amount, Status, Actions

view_invoice.record_payment_button: WORKING - Record Payment button in modal
